commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=1d45897156fcee6a0b4d1b9048234d4519dd3352)
commands.review_summary:
The PR decodes explicit Copilot `unlimited` quota snapshots, preserves them as 0%-used windows instead of placeholders, and adds model and fetcher regression coverage.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main deterministically discards the supplied zero-entitlement unlimited payload, and the branch fixtures exercise the corrected path. The real-account result has not been reproduced with inspectable evidence in this review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining merge gate is contributor-supplied current-head real-account proof, which a repair worker cannot manufacture; the changelog cleanup is mechanical but secondary.

target.title: Fix Copilot unlimited chat quota display
target.body:
## Summary
- Decode Copilot quota snapshots that explicitly report `unlimited`.
- Keep unlimited zero-entitlement Copilot chat quota snapshots instead of treating them as placeholders.
- Add regression coverage for an unlimited chat-like quota without `percent_remaining`.

## Why
GitHub Copilot can report chat as an unlimited quota snapshot with `entitlement=0` and `remaining=0`. CodexBar's placeholder filter treated that shape as unusable, so the Copilot menu only showed Premium and dropped the unlimited Chat lane.

This keeps the existing placeholder behavior for ordinary zero-entitlement snapshots. The exception only applies when the payload explicitly says `unlimited: true`.

## Validation
- `swift test --filter CopilotUsageModelsTests`
- `swift test --filter CopilotUsageFetcherTests`
- `./Scripts/lint.sh lint`
- Live CLI proof against the same Copilot account: installed CodexBar `0.32.4` returns `secondary: null`; this branch returns `secondary.usedPercent: 0`.
target.author: soumikbhatta

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
